title: Kiziltug - Cengiz Han
actors: Mesiha Yelda, Turan Seyfioglu, Cahit Irgat
plot: Otsukarci, a wandering Turkish warrior, befriends Mongol chieftain Genghis Khan, and helps him in his battle against a rival warlord, saving his life in the process. Grateful, the Khan offers him a top position as one of his gener...
